title: fabricia porrecta
intro: Fabricia porrecta, also known as African sage or Kinkelha, is a perennial plant native to tropical Africa that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fabricia porrecta include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, made by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used as a tincture, extracted in alcohol to enhance its bioavailability.
